title: eryngium sanguisorba
intro: Eryngium sanguisorba, also known as the Red Sea Holly or Sea Holly, is a type of flowering plant in the Apiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Eryngium sanguisorba include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve skin conditions, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
